/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o foo_taglookup.dylib -install_name @rpath/foo_taglookup.dylib CMakeFiles/foo_taglookup.dir/src/component_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/foo_taglookup.dir/src/tag_lookup_service.cpp.o  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd libfb2k_component_client.a libfb2k_sdk.a libfb2k_shared.a libfb2k_pfc.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework Foundation -framework AppKit
